name: Aletsch Glacier Hike
description: Guided hike along Europe's longest glacier — a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
longDescription: The Great Aletsch Glacier is the longest glacier in the Alps at 23 km and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Guided glacier hikes take you across the ice with crampons, through crevasses and past stunning blue ice formations.

providers.name: Aletsch Arena (Panorama Trail)
providers.description: Cable car + panoramic trail (no glacier walking)

providers.name: Alpine Center Glacier Hike
providers.description: Guided on-ice glacier walk with crampons and equipment
